prompt:
Find public web news, official posts, and sourceable social/media updates about the Polish charity livestream “Diss na raka” / “Łatwogang” / Fundacja Cancer Fighters between Saturday 25 April 2026 18:00 CEST and Sunday 26 April 2026 18:00 CEST.

Track only source-backed events from this window. Include fundraising counter snapshots, milestone thresholds, celebrity appearances, head-shaving challenges, phone/video calls with public figures, corporate donations, major individual or celebrity donations, media coverage, Guinness/world-record claims, whether the stream/campaign was still ongoing, viral moments, auctions, pledged rewards, foundation updates, and contradictions/corrections between sources.

Important rules:
- Do not call any checkpoint “final” unless the source explicitly says the campaign ended and later evidence does not contradict it.
- If later evidence shows the campaign continued, treat earlier “final” amounts as checkpoints.
- Prefer Europe/Warsaw local times for human labels and UTC ISO timestamps for machine sorting.
- Deduplicate syndicated articles and keep the strongest/original source.
- Every event must include source URLs.
- Separate confirmed facts from unverified claims.
- Descriptions should be concise and in Polish, ready to insert into lib/site-data.ts.
- Use project-compatible field names: targetAmount, dateAchieved, dateLocal, relativeTime, sortUtc, zrodlo, participants, category, description, tags.

Known user-observed checkpoint to verify:
- 188,571,160 PLN visible on the YouTube/Tipply stream overlay around 2026-04-26 17:53-17:55 CEST. Treat as user-provided screenshot evidence unless independently verified by another public source.

Search likely sources including TVN24, Onet, Plejada, Przegląd Sportowy Onet, WP, RMF FM, Polskie Radio, Bankier, Pudelek, GlamRap, Gazeta Wrocławska, TVP, MMA.pl, CGM, NowyMarketing, official Cancer Fighters channels, Łatwogang/YouTube live pages, and public social posts.
